description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

A special human rights consultation office will be open on June 3 (Wednesday) from 10:00 a.m. to 3:00 p.m. at Hanno Central District Administrative Center. We handle consultations on human rights violations including sexual harassment, power harassment, domestic violence, physical abuse, bullying, online defamation, and discrimination. Consultations are free and conducted by human rights advocates. Please don't hesitate to reach out—you don't have to worry alone.

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/soshikikarasagasu/shiminseikatsubu/jinkenkurashianzen/11548.html
summary: ℹ️ Special human rights consultation office opens for Human Rights Advocates Day
